tracks.rawText: 2:3710.6s Recording (May 7 @ 11:17 PM)v5.5CoverElectroswing with a high-tempo, syncopated rhythm, A bright, staccato piano riff plays a repetitive minor-key pattern, A synthesized bass follows the kick drum with a heavy, sub-frequency punch, The drum kit features a crisp, high-tuned snare and a prominent open hi-hat on the off-beats, A brass section consisting of trumpets and trombones performs staccato stabs and a melodic hook with a slight swing feel, A scratch effect occurs periodically, The tempo is 124 BPM in the key of G minor2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:1010.6s Recording (May 7 @ 11:17 PM)UploadIndustrial techno with heavy EBM influences, A distorted, overdriven kick drum drives the rhythm at 130 BPM in 4/4 time, A resonant, syncopated synth bassline follows a 16th-note pattern with high-pass filter automation, Metallic percussion hits and white noise snares punctuate the off-beats, A dark, detuned saw-wave lead synth plays a repetitive minor-key motif, Gritty, industrial sound effects and mechanical whirring textures are layered throughout the arrangement, The track features a high-energy, aggressive sonic profile with heavy compression and saturation on the master bus2PublishRemix
